description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by a low green hedge. The structure features a flat roof and clean white exterior walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious wooden deck. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a small garden with a flowering tree. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while the opposite end of the property has a grassy area and additional landscaping. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living. The property is well-suited for suburban or upscale urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large windows, and the full length of the wooden deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area, pool, and flowering tree, with the deck and outdoor furniture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, pool, grassy area, and the hedge boundary, with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, carport, and secondary entrance, with landscaping and garden details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
